examples: Hungering Cold - Your Hungering Cold ability no longer costs runic power.
Icy Touch: the damage loss hurts us more than other specs, but the extra Runic Power is too nice to pass up.
During the FS section, Frost Strike until out of Runic Power. Use Rime procs to cast HB during this time as well.
This time around, Runic is introducing a much larger, more customizable, and most importantly cooperative gaming experience.
And apparently quite a few people felt the same way about this scrappy indie title from Runic Games.
